name: compliance closed-loop validation reports a per-step status summary covering each pipeline phase
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=catalog' out.txt && grep -q 'step=mapping' out.txt && grep -q 'step=rule' out.txt && grep -q 'step=manifest' out.txt && grep -q 'step=audit' out.txt && grep -q 'step=checkpoint' out.txt && grep -q 'step=audit-pack' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
